creator: fcsk.aim@gmail.com
text:
Hi, i'am using FreeBSD 11 CURENT , and after a clean install i just installed mysql57-server, pkg install mysql57-server.
added in rc.conf


and when i tried to run service mysql-server start i get this.
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/mysql-server: WARNING: failed precmd routine for mysql


I think it's a bug. Why ? because it was a clean install , no programs , no changes maded to system.
